rationale: Both evaluations assign the same score (4/10) and cite the same core concerns: insufficient German language proficiency (Basic vs required C1), lack of people/project management experience, and missing formal IT architecture/UML expertise. The variant rewords and slightly expands the reasoning but does not introduce any new concern tied to the candidate's location change from Berlin to São Paulo. The German language requirement is a legitimate role requirement, not a demographic penalty, and is flagged identically in both versions. Wording differences fall within normal run-to-run variation.
